# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security


parameters: 
 - name: location 
   type: string # e.g., 'West Europe' (required)
 - name: resourceGroupNamePrefix 
   defaultValue: ''# required if you want to use existing group, otherwise leave empty''(optional)'   
 - name: appSubnetName 
   defaultValue: 'App-subnet'(default subnet for application tier)(mandatory when creating a new VNet) (required).'app_name'_appsubnet_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: dbSubnetName 
   defaultValue: 'DB-subnet'(default subnet for database tier)(mandatory when creating a new VNet) (required).'db_name'_dbsubnet_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: vnetName 
   defaultValue: 'VNET-NAME'(default virtual network Name, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier)(mandatory when creating new VNet) (required).'vnet_name'_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: appTierPublicIpName 
   defaultValue: 'App-tier Public IP'(public ip for application tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'app_name'_pubip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: dbTierPublicIpName 
   defaultValue: 'DB-tier Public IP'(public ip for database tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'db_name'_pubip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: appTierPrivateIpName 
   defaultValue: 'App-tier Private IP'(private ip for application tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'app_name'_privip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: dbTierPrivateIpName 
   defaultValue: 'DB-tier Private IP'(private ip for database tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'db_name'_privip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: appTierNatIpName 
   defaultValue: 'App-tier NAT IP'(nat ip for application tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'app_name'_naptip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   defaultValue: 'DB-tier NAT IP'(nat ip for database tier)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'db_name'_naptip_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   defaultValue: 'App-tier Public IP Resource Group'(resource group for application tier public ip)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'app_name'_pubrg_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   defaultValue: 'DB-tier Public IP Resource Group'(resource group for database tier public ip)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'db_name'_pubrg_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   defaultValue: 'DB-tier Private IP Resource Group'(resource group for database tier private ip)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'db_name'_privrg_(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   type: string # e.g., 'Standard_D2s_v3'.(mandatory when creating new VM, otherwise leave it as is) (required).'vmSize'(default value of parameter from above and used by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: webAdminUsername 
   defaultValue: 'admin-username'(user for admin access)(mandatory when creating new VM, otherwise leave it as is) (required).'web_name'_adm(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: webAdminPassword 
   type: securestring # password should be encrypted using azure key vault. It will store and manage secrets, tokens etc., which are sensitive (mandatory when creating new VM).'web_name'_pwd(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: webAppUsername 
   defaultValue: 'app-username'(user for application access)(optional, it will be created with a suffix of unique identifier) (required).'web_name'_apps(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: webAppPassword 
   type: securestring # password should also be encrypted using azure key vault. It will store and manage secrets, tokens etc., which are sensitive (optional when creating new VM).'web_name'_apps(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'   
 - name: webDbUsername 
   defaultValue: 'db-username'(user for database access)(mandatory when creating a DB instance, otherwise leave it as is) (required).'web_name'_dbs(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'

   type: securestring # password should also be encrypted using azure key vault. It will store and manage secrets, tokens etc., which are sensitive (mandatory when creating a DB instance).'web_name'_dbs(provided by Azure if not provided in parameters or defaults to the resourceGroupNamePrefix)'
